subject: chore(icons): remove redundant apple-touch-icon copy, note icon sync gap
body:
Removed the manually-copied apple-touch-icon.png from
dashboard/public/assets/images/ — the generate script doesn't manage
that directory, so it would drift. The root-level copy at
dashboard/public/apple-touch-icon.png (managed by the script) is the
one referenced by the <link> tag.

Added a TODO for the broader issue: dashboard/public/assets/images/
icons are manual copies not synced by the generate script.

Tags: icons, cleanup, documentation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: patch
